title: CAMP DISCOVERY - 211info
text: EPILEPSY FOUNDATION OREGON CAMP DISCOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a summer camp where children experience archery, rock climbing, hiking, swimming, arts/crafts, campfire games and much more. Families can rest assured that their loved ones will be under constant medical supervision 24 hours a day while at camp. 16409 SE Division Street Suite 216 Pmb 1115 Portland, OR 97236 Eligibility: Children with epilepsy and their siblings ages 7-16. Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm. Camp: July 26-29, 2026. Registration opens April 2026. Email (503) 205-1404 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 205-1404 Main phone (800) 332-1000 Helpline Main phone (503) 205-1404 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or apply online FEES: Children with epilepsy and one sibling ages 7-16 are free. Other siblings are $125 each. DOCUMENTS: See registration forms for what is required from neurologist and family LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Camps * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - EPILEPSY FOUNDATION OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
